sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111111" key="filodaitu/mwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλο-δαιτύμων</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῠ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ονος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n111111.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fond of guests,</tr_> Hdn.Gr.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg9022.tlg001:2:727" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.727</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
